message:
fix(warn): silence 6 unused #[must_use] warnings in splay_tree and vEB tests

SplayTree::get() and VanEmdeBoas::new() are #[must_use], but test code
called them for side effects (splaying to root, triggering panics).
Added `let _ =` to explicitly discard return values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
